evals.prompt: I want to spin up an isolated Claude container on Ubuntu to work on a project at ~/software_projects/my-app. What do I need to do?
evals.expected_output: Should check prerequisites (Docker running, .env token configured), then guide the user to run spawn.sh with --project flag pointing to their app directory. Should mention that the image auto-builds if it doesn't exist.

evals.prompt: How does authentication work in the containers? I want to deploy these to a cloud server eventually.
evals.expected_output: Should explain the three auth methods (OAuth token, API key, interactive login), recommend OAuth token for local and API key for cloud/production, cover token lifecycle (1 year expiry), manual generation requirement, and secrets management for cloud deployment.

evals.prompt: Build all the container images and tell me if everything looks good
evals.expected_output: Should check Docker is running first, then execute build-all.sh, report results for each distro (ubuntu, alpine, debian), and flag any build failures with troubleshooting advice.
